security.removePinMessage: Are you sure you want to remove your PIN? This will also disable app lock.
security.screenSecurityEnabledAndroid: Screenshots and screen recording will now show blank content for protected screens.
security.screenSecurityEnabledIOS: You will be notified if someone tries to record or screenshot protected content.
security.screenSecurityUpdateFailed: Failed to update screen security settings.
security.aboutScreenSecurityAndroid: On Android, screenshots and recordings of protected screens will appear completely blank.
security.aboutScreenSecurityIOS: On iOS, when screen recording is detected, sensitive content will be blurred and you'll receive a notification.
security.updateScreenSecurityFailedMessage: Failed to update screen security settings.
security.aboutMessageAndroid:
Dryft protects your privacy by preventing screenshots and screen recordings on sensitive screens.

On Android, screenshots and recordings of protected screens will appear completely blank.

Protected screens include: Chats, Video Calls, Profiles, Matches, Payment, and Verification screens.
security.aboutMessageIOS:
Dryft protects your privacy by preventing screenshots and screen recordings on sensitive screens.

On iOS, when screen recording is detected, sensitive content will be blurred and you'll receive a notification.

Protected screens include: Chats, Video Calls, Profiles, Matches, Payment, and Verification screens.
